overall.description: A first-person perspective walk down a narrow, rain-soaked residential street at night in a video game. The scene features wet asphalt reflecting street lamps, Japanese-style houses with metal gates and fences, and an eerie, atmospheric mood with heavy rainfall and fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow residential alley in heavy rain

agents.ego_description: walking cautiously down the rain-soaked street, observing the surroundings

entered.detail: tall black metal fence running along the left sidewalk
two-story house with illuminated windows and black metal gate
discarded cardboard boxes and bags piled against the fence
tall street lamp casting yellow light through the rain and fog

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow, rain-soaked residential street at night. A black metal fence lines the left side while a traditional Japanese house with glowing windows stands on the right. The camera moves forward past discarded cardboard boxes, heading toward a distant street lamp barely visible through the heavy rain and fog.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching parked vehicle in residential alley

events.description: blue sedan becomes visible parked on the left side of the street ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing down the street toward the parked vehicle

entered.detail: dark blue sedan parked on the left side of the narrow street with headlights off

segments.scene_description: As the camera progresses down the alley, the cardboard boxes are left behind and a blue sedan comes into view parked on the left. The residential building on the right recedes into the mid-ground while the street lamp ahead grows slightly larger through the persistent rain. The atmosphere remains tense and quiet with no other movement.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement down a rain-soaked residential alley that gradually reveals more of its desolate, nocturnal surroundings. It begins by gliding past a black metal fence and a traditional Japanese house with glowing windows, moving through heavy rain and fog toward a distant, dim street lamp. As the camera progresses, the initial house recedes into the mid-ground and discarded cardboard boxes are left behind. The scene then opens up to reveal a blue sedan parked on the left, while the street lamp ahead grows larger and more defined through the persistent downpour. The movement concludes as the camera pushes deeper into the tense, quiet atmosphere of the narrow street.
